title: Count objects 1
description: Practice counting up to 20 objects. Objects are organized neatly into rows and columns.

hints:
We count the turtles like this:

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/67297900e1699b595485402fd92bf1c9.png)

The number we say last is $\purple{20}$.
There are $\purple{20}$ turtles.

We count the foxes like this: 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e62bd39e104bf8c6bcc392c0c95fd8cb.png)

The number we say last is $\blue{4}$.
There are $\blue{4}$ foxes.

We count the bananas like this:

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7152f3b90df6b9d2e9857a1325e3ad08.png)

The number we say last is $\blue{12}$.
There are $\blue{12}$ bananas.

We count the sheep like this:

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/683d4c5e56aca9f0ff9bfd4b4b0243c5.png)

The number we say last is $\red{17}$.

There are $\red{17}$ sheep.

I hope that didn't make you sleepy!

We count the seals like this:

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b89ec48c59586a0938f1abbd5d5b2bc2.png)

The number we say last is $\pink{3}$.
There are $\pink{3}$ seals.

We count the flowers like this:

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/512a7e5f31bd27bab983724682dfbfe4.png)

The number we say last is $\purple{5}$.
There are $\purple{5}$ flowers.

We count the sharks like this: 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d78e11f256f4ce22005ce9378fe1849a.png)

The number we say last is $\pink{13}$.
There are $\pink{13}$ sharks.

We count the caterpillars like this:

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cdea743e10f37d713647062be291c862.png)

The number we say last is $\pink{16}$.
There are $\pink{16}$ caterpillars.

We count the apples like this:

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/11128ee1453edf2a5e1d6a90e465b4ce.png)

The number we say last is $\green{8}$.
There are $\green{8}$ apples.

We count the ponies like this:  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9c3ac958287514d663c37e0844d84229.png)

The number we say last is $\blue9$.
There are $\blue9$ ponies.
